name: Halle Turner
ai_summary: Halle Turner is an elementary education student with 1.5 years of drop-in childcare experience across ages 6 weeks to 10 years. She's highly flexible and passionate about working with children, making her a strong fit for UpKid's adaptable environment.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Holly. I am 20 years old and I have lived in Utah. My whole life I'm currently studying Elementary education at the University of Utah.
